name: automated-test-pipeline
description: Automated Testing in DevOps CI/CD Pipeline — Unit, API, and UI/E2E tests with quality gates

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e:playwright && npm run test:e2e:selenium
scripts.test:e2e:selenium:headed: npx cross-env SELENIUM_HEADED=true jest tests/e2e/selenium --verbose --runInBand --config jest-selenium.config.js
scripts.test:preview: npm run test:e2e:playwright:headed && npm run test:e2e:selenium:headed
